Done. `pc archeologist` now shows a live token/cost tally in both modes.

What changed:
- Fixed `RunCounters` to actually accumulate usage from real `llm.response` events (flat `prompt_tokens` / `completion_tokens` / `cost_usd`) instead of only the stale `usage.*` nested shape.
- Added a `cost_usd` accumulator.
- TUI header now shows: `Cost  est ~$lo-$hi   actual ~$X.XX   tokens X in / Y out`, with the actual cost colored green/yellow/red against the estimate.
- Line-log mode prints a running tally after each session (`... ok  tokens 12.3K in / 4.1K out  $0.0042`) and a final summary with total tokens + cost.
- TUI final summary also includes tokens in/out and cost.
- Updated unit tests to cover both usage shapes + cost accumulation.

Verified:
- `cargo test -p proactive-context archeologist` — 9 passed
- `cargo check -p proactive-context` — clean
- `cargo run --bin pc -- archeologist --yes --dry-run` — still works
